_comment: OPTIONAL. Projects are already named by their git repo, so single repos don't fragment. Use this only to merge SEPARATE repos you think of as one product (e.g. a multi-repo workspace) into one canonical project. Each key is the canonical name; its array lists the repo names (as shown by `brain-rag list` / list_projects) that should fold into it. Absent or malformed => no aliasing (identity). It affects list_projects, search filtering, and get_state/save_state (which read/write state/<canonical>.md). Do NOT merge in a repo whose sessions are off-topic — that re-introduces contamination.
